ℵ: Pinned by architecture — value fixed at natural-form (R59 F59)
Free — joint solver adjusts per sheet
Derived — structural relationship (e.g. σ_ra = sε · σ_ta)
Constrained — value follows from other knobs within ranges
Ruled out by prior work (R59 / Track 7c) — breaks signature or α universality
Candidate — zero by default but not fully tested
σ_ta = sign · √α — tube ↔ ℵ (sign per sheet e/p/ν = +/-/+)
σ_at = 4πα — ℵ ↔ t (delivers α to time)
k_x — per-sheet Ma diagonal scale (Track 7b solver finds k_e=k_p=k_ν=0.04696)
k_x · (1 + (sε)²_x) — ring diagonal in sheet block
k_x · s_x · ε_x — in-sheet shear (tube-ring within one sheet)
cross-sheet σ entry (Ma-Ma cross) — zero in R60 baseline

column1: Metric is symmetric — the table shows the full 11×11 with entries above and below the main diagonal equal.
